pattern: Maximizing one product while minimizing the other reduces to pairing the two largest values against the two smallest.
hints: The difference grows when the first product is as large as possible and the second is as small as possible.
All values are positive, so the largest product comes from the two biggest numbers and the smallest from the two smallest.
Find the two largest and two smallest elements (a single pass or a sort) and return max1*max2 - min1*min2.

edge_inputs.description: duplicated max should still allow two large picks

stress.description: large array of random positive integers
